subject: Recommendation For My Neighbors !!!
body:
Hey neighbors, Eric is coming to my house to clean my Ducts and vent. I had 
his service last year and was really happy with it. He is offering a group 
discount Does anyone want to join the group rate? We need at least 5 people.

The group rate is $199 Thanks!

If you're Interested just send me your house address and contact number or 
you can reach him at 786- 952-3671 and he'll add you to the list of 
interested once. Thanks!
